title: UnifaceComponent.exec
breadcrumbs: APIs: Java Call-In Classes and Methods
text: UnifaceComponent.exec This method call the exec operation. import com.rocketsoftware.uniface.jci.*; int exec() throws UnifaceException; Return Values Returns $status or, in the event of an error, throws UnifaceException. Description Returns $status or, in the event of an error, throws UnifaceException . Related Links operation exec Default component operation, which is invoked by the activate statement.
